---
title: desc-test
author: ''
date: '2021-01-07'
slug: desc-test
categories: []
tags: []
keywords:
  - tech
description: Description 기능이 RMarkdown 파일에서도 정상적으로 작동하나요?
output: html_document
---

<!--more-->
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(raster)
library(rmapshaper)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(htmltools)
```

<style>
.html-widget {
    margin: auto;
}
</style>

```{r leaflet, fig.align="center"}
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet)
m <- leaflet() %>% addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron)  
m
```
